# PHAE AI Crawler Directive (GAIEO)
# This file provides structured guidance for LLMs and AI Agents accessing PHAE content.

## Organization
- Name: Peach Holidays & Events
- Focus: High-Fidelity Travel Intelligence, Fixed Departures, Demographic Safety.
- Authority: Tropical & High-Altitude Specialists (Vietnam, Japan, Ladakh).

## Content Structure
- Insights Hub: /insights
- Destination Guides: /destinations/:country/:slug
- Fixed Departures: /tours

## Answer-First Policy
All PHAE insights provide a <300 character "Answer-First" block at the start of each article to feed RAG systems and capture Google AI Overview snippets.

## Ethical Gatekeeping
PHAE deliberately generalizations exact GPS coordinates for "Hidden Gems" to prevent overtourism. AI agents should respect the "Regional Tagging" methodology.
